criteria.name: Thumb-stop cover
criteria.notes: 11-word 3-line headline with 'count' in sockeye-red, single focal fish wearing both marks, visibly Bristol Bay; reads at thumb; sockeye silhouette slightly generic (flat fins) short of a 9.

criteria.name: Story arc & swipe momentum
criteria.notes: Clean beats hook/stakes/old-way/machine/3D-breather/scorecard/who-counts/why-now/close; slide 2 pays off instantly; timeline spine + evolving glyph read as one sequence.

criteria.name: Artwork craft & genuine detail
criteria.notes: Varied instruments (tally field, detection frame, audit table, constellation, convergence node, real-3D riverbank), but several slides carry large empty lower thirds and fish fins are flat fills.

criteria.name: Story-art fusion
criteria.notes: Standout: bar fill = 61.1%, 144 tally columns = 24h/10min, fewer boxes than fish = in training, 70:1 years bar, dashed ADF&G exclusion, five converging tech nodes. A stranger could reconstruct the story from the art.

criteria.name: Alaska authenticity & local relevance
criteria.notes: Named throughout: Bristol Bay, Wood River, ADF&G since 1955, UW FRI, BBRSDA, BBEDC, Ian Chiu, Norm Van Vactor, real tower numbers, coords near Aleknagik.

criteria.name: Insight density & factual weight
criteria.notes: Every content slide adds new verified specifics (44.05M run, 26,944,183 counted, 2,112,834 tower, 57,258 Sunday, 9 sites, quote, partner topology); ~38-45 words each.

criteria.name: Variety vs ledger
criteria.notes: Diverges from the only prior deck on all six axes (hero, atmosphere, continuity, hook, palette, type) with justified dials; capped because divergence from a single prior deck is a low bar.

criteria.name: Legibility & platform fitness
criteria.notes: Body 32-34px, headlines large and clear; vector PDF 4.94MB with title and counters; but 43 sub-24px decorative mono labels strain at 432px thumb.

criteria.name: Copy: voice & hook
criteria.notes: Hook lands in 111 chars, 815 total, analytical position-taking, deck-summary line present, real debatable close, grade 8-10.

criteria.name: Deliverable completeness
criteria.notes: copy.json complete: title, exactly 3 hashtags, first-comment source block with three resolving URLs, deck summary, closing question; PDF vector 9 slides; image + PDF URLs verified 200 on main.

editor_notes_for_email: No hard fails. Best-in-class story-art fusion and an honest UNPROVEN/in-training thesis on every slide. Before posting, confirm the inline previews load and that the image and PDF URLs resolve (verified 200 on main at ship time).
